verdict.note: Both list pages render the SAME .lp-head/.lp-row/.lp-empty chrome (row className identical); both detail pages the SAME .ds-page skeleton — evals detail: title+node/status/A-B, main workspace + thread + sticky .ds-compose, side rail; issues detail (screenshot): title, status pill, body, composer w/ Promote+Close, side rail STORE/OPENED BY/SPEC NODES. 390px reflow puts .ds-side first (measured on the mobile leg). One implementation: ReviewShell.jsx.
GitHub oracle matched: desktop 32/48/65px; 390px 358-wide query, 49px metadata, 133.6px long row, zero horizontal overflow.

Chromium 1228: with a live cursor, Closed/Author/kebab/New Enter execute their own commands without row navigation; facet Space remains native; after Escape leaves Author focused, j advances cursor; query input owns j/k/Enter.
